items.example: You have to arrive at school before 8.30.
You don't have to bring your own books — the school provides them.
You mustn't run in the corridors.
You can use a calculator in the exam.
You can't park your car in front of the school gate.
Is it compulsory to wear a tie with the uniform?
There's a rule that you must switch off your phone in class.
Attending the after-school club is optional.
